pullRequest.title: DOM-55990 implement create template backing project service API

nodes.body: had to create a new service to break a cyclic dependency. the cyclic dependency happened because everythin depends on the ProjectService, so the ProjectService can't depend on other things, specifically some of the model services
Should we move "create project" calls to the ProjectCreator here as well? Or keep those in the old ProjectServiceAdapter?
I think so.....it would be nice to move them and make the code more coherent
It was too hard to move it and refactor all the tests. I would rather file a tech debt ticket to refactor this
There is overlap here with what gaston implemented. We can refactor this to use his stuff later
This is the logic that adds the extra stuff that templates will use. Regular project copy could use this, too.
I think there's an overlap with Gaston's stuff here too, where he has a ProjectType enum for "git-based" and "dfs". We can merge them later
If there are no failures, we can just let it be an empty list (i assume you're talking about failures)
Nit: this variable name makes it sound like a boolean, maybe "uncopiedDatasets" instead
